moved_or_demoted: trade log is no longer the default active surface on page load
secondary drawer/tab area now defaults to Shadow instead of Trade Log
trade log remains in secondary drawer/tab space and is not active by default
a new live-games-focus section was placed above the games ticker and above secondary drawer surfaces
report.above_the_fold_now: Live monitor + accounting strip + live game focus section are now the dominant above-the-fold content
report.why_genuinely_live_game_first: The initial viewport now leads with live monitor cards and a dedicated live-games-focus section. On page load, the user lands on live game / active position context first, while trade history sits behind a non-default secondary surface. This is a structural default-state change, not a cosmetic relabel.

notes: No backend addition was needed for this hierarchy fix.
Truth layer remained intact: main positions still come from real paper trades, and shadow remains secondary.
